summary: The diff modifies Layout.tsx to revert sidebar styling back to a dark teal appearance using CSS tokens, which partially addresses REQ-1. However, there is insufficient evidence that all acceptance criteria are met — specifically, the 'Made by DEV' badge styling revert and widget colour (calendar widget, streak card, quote card, etc.) reverts are not visible in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: The 'Made by DEV' badge styling/colours match the pre-Version-10 state.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not show any changes to the MadeByDevBadge component or its styling. The file summary for Dashboard.tsx and LoginPage.tsx mention MadeByDevBadge but no diff content showing badge colour/style revert is present.

missing_requirements.requirement: All widget colours (calendar widget, streak card, quote card, etc.) are restored to their pre-Version-10 appearance.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff only shows Layout.tsx being modified. There are no changes shown for CalendarWidget, streak card, quote card, or other dashboard widget components that may have had colour overrides introduced in Version 10.
